sentiment: Even the clearest proofs dissolve when held against the light.

stories.title: Terence Tao's ChatGPT conversation about the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample
stories.summary: A mathematician of Terence Tao's stature using ChatGPT as a collaborator rather than a calculator — the shape of proof is shifting beneath our feet.

stories.title: git's --end-of-options Flag
stories.summary: A tiny edge-case flag no one thinks about until they need it — sometimes the most important tools are the ones that prevent confusion at the boundary.
